questions.question: Consider the following statements: 1. Amarkantak Hills are at the confluence of Vindhya and Sahyadri Ranges 2. Biligirirangan Hills constitute the easternmost part of Satpura Range 3. Seshachalam Hills constitute the southernmost part of Western Ghats How many of the above statements are correct?
Consider the following pairs: Peak - Mountains 1. Namcha Barwa - Garhwal Himalaya 2. Nanda Devi - Kumaon Himalaya 3. Nokrek - Sikkim Himalaya Which of the pairs given above is/are correctly matched?
Siachen Glacier is situated to the:

Consider the following statements: 1. The Barren Island volcano is an active volcano located in the Indian territory. 2. Barren Island lies about 140 kms east of Great Nicobar. 3. The last time the Barren Island volcano erupted was in 1991 and it has remained inactive since then. Which of the statement given below is/are correct?
'Gadgil Committee Report' and 'Kasturirangan Committee Report', sometimes seen in the news, are related to:

Consider the following pairs: Hills Region: 1. Cardamom Hills: Coromandel Coast 2. Kaimur Hills: Konkan Coast 3. Mahadeo Hills: Central India 4. Mikir Hills: North-East India Which of the above pairs are correctly matched?

When you travel in Himalayas, you will see the following: 1. Deep gorges 2. U-turn river courses 3. Parallel mountain ranges 4. Steep gradients causing land sliding Which of the above can be said to be the evidences for Himalayas being young fold mountains?

If there were no Himalayan ranges, what would have been the most likely geographical impact on India? 1. Much of the country would experience the cold waves from Siberia. 2. Indo - gangetic plain would be devoid of such extensive alluvial soils. 3. The pattern of monsoon would be different from what it is at present. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?

In which State is the Guru Shikhar Peak located?
Where were Shevaroy Hills located?
Which one of the following Himalayan passes was reopened around in the middle of the year 2006 to facilitate trade between India and China?

options.B: The Anai Mudi is the highest peak in the Western Ghats
options.C: Tapi river lies to the south of Satpura
options.D: The Narmada and the Tapi river valleys are said to be old rift valleys

questions.question: Which one of the following is the correct sequence of the given hills starting from the north and going towards the south?

options.A: Nallamalai Hills, Nilgiri Hills, Javadi Hills, Anaimalai Hills
options.B: Anaimalai Hills, Javadi Hills, Nilgiri Hills, Nallamalai Hills
options.C: Nallamalai Hills, Javadi Hills, Nilgiri Hills, Anaimalai Hills
options.D: Anaimalai Hills, Nilgiri Hills, Javadi Hills, Nallamalai Hills

questions.question: Consider the map given below: The places marked A, B, C and D in the map are respectively:

options.A: Rift valley region, Chhattisgarh plain, Rain shadow region and Chotanagpur plateau
options.B: Chattisgarh plain, Chotanagpur plateau, Rift valley region and Rain shadow region
options.C: Rift valley region, Chattisgarh plain, Chotanagpur plateau and Rain shadow region
options.D: Chattisgarh plain, Rain shadow region, Chotanagpur plateau and Rift valley region

questions.question: 'Saddle Peak', the highest peak of Andaman and Nicobar islands, is located in:
Which one of the following mountain ranges is spread over only one State in India?
Arakan Yoma is the extension of the Himalayas located in:
Examine the map of Jammu and Kashmir given below: The mountain ranges marked 1, 2, 3 and 4 are respectively:

options.A: Ladakh, Zanskar, Karakoram and Pir Panjal
options.B: Karakoram, Ladakh, Zanskar and Pir Panjal
